sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
I removed all 40 remaining bars. Looking at the image, all the gray bars are now gone - both left and right sides are cleared. The level is still not complete though. I need to click the blue blob like in level 1.
Let me check the current state and then click the blue blob.

sections.label: ASSISTANT
sections.content:
World model: All 44 gray bars have been removed (4 on row 33 + 40 remaining). Both left and right bar grids are now cleared. Level still not complete - need to click the blue blob like in level 1.
Plan: Click the blue blob to complete the level.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Find the blue blob
seg = current_frame.segmentation
blue_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b']
print(f"Blue nodes: {len(blue_nodes)}")
for n in blue_nodes:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    center_row = sum(rows) // len(rows)
    center_col = sum(cols) // len(cols)
    print(f"  Node {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, center=({center_row}, {center_col}), boundary={b}")

# The blue blob is node 107 (69 pixels) at bottom right
# Click it
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 46}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
